cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: If $5 goes with Hazelnut, then Ristretto goes with Danish.
The Ristretto order's price is lower than both the order with Cinnamon syrup and the order in the Crimson mug.
Either Tart goes with Maple or Hazelnut goes with Tart.
$6 goes with at least two of Greta, Cortado, Tart, Cinnamon, and Jade.
Between Ava and Greta, one goes with Danish and the other with Maple.
Dane goes with at most one of Croissant, Almond, Cobalt, and $8.
Either $6 goes with Latte or Ben goes with Bagel.
Cortado, Espresso, and Ristretto go with Crimson, Jade, and $5, in some order.
Maple goes with exactly four of Ava, Cortado, Tart, Crimson, and $7.
$8 goes with exactly four of Dane, Espresso, Tart, Hazelnut, and Jade.

space.name: The Mars Colony
space.description: The first colonists of a new Mars settlement each took a different role and hail from a different world. Work out who's who.
clues: If 7 ly goes with Europa, then Technician goes with Drift.
The Technician's distance is lower than both the colonist from Earth and the colonist studying Diatoms.
Either Lumen goes with Ganymede or Europa goes with Lumen.
8 ly goes with at least two of Okafor, Engineer, Lumen, Earth, and Geode.
Between Anders and Okafor, one goes with Drift and the other with Ganymede.
Dasari goes with at most one of Cortex, Callisto, Basalt, and 10 ly.
Either 8 ly goes with Medic or Bauer goes with Aurora.
Engineer, Geologist, and Technician go with Diatoms, Geode, and 7 ly, in some order.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: If 5 lb goes with Catfish, then Wobbler goes with Leech.

chess.name: The Chess Club
